caption:
DS Nails came to us with a problem: clients were booking through Instagram DMs, missing appointments, and losing revenue.

We built them a proper booking site — service menu, pricing, gallery, and an auth system so clients can manage their own appointments.

Now their bookings are organised. No more lost DMs. No more no-shows without notice.

This is what a website should do. Not just look good — solve a real business problem.

See the work → dsnail.vercel.app
